name: Army SFL-TAP Program
whatItProvides: Soldier for Life - Transition Assistance Program providing counseling, workshops, and commander verification tools.

name: Army SFL-TAP Virtual Center
whatItProvides: 24/7 online transition assistance portal for Soldiers who cannot access a physical installation center.

name: Army Career Skills Program (CSP)
whatItProvides: Allows Soldiers in their last 180 days of service to participate in civilian apprenticeships, internships, and job training.

name: Navy TAP / MyNavyHR
whatItProvides: Strategic transition services, counseling, checklists, and instruction paths governed by MyNavyHR.

name: Navy Fleet and Family Support Centers (FFSC)
whatItProvides: Installation-level classes, resources, pre-separation counseling, and employment workshops.

name: Navy Local Career Services & TAP
whatItProvides: Local commands and base-level transition advisors who guide sailors through resumes and regional employer partnerships.

name: Marine Corps Transition Readiness Program (TRP)
whatItProvides: Main Marine Corps organization executing statutory transition requirements and coordinating employment/education assistance.

name: Marine Corps Transition Readiness Seminar (TRS)
whatItProvides: Mandatory transition course covering core curriculum, post-military pathways, budget preparation, and command sign-off.

name: Marine For Life Network
whatItProvides: Connects transitioning Marines and veterans to local business leaders, colleges, and employment resources post-service.

name: Marine Corps Initial Counseling
whatItProvides: The opening step in the USMC transition process to identify individual goals and determine required tracks.

name: Marine Corps Pre-Separation Counseling
whatItProvides: Required legal briefing outlining federal rights, veteran benefits, and separation timelines.

name: Marine Corps Spouse Transition Support
whatItProvides: Transition readiness checklists and guides optimized for Marine spouses and family members.

name: Department of the Air Force TAP
whatItProvides: Transition assistance and curriculum oversight delivered through installation Military & Family Readiness Centers (M&FRC) for Airmen and Guardians.

name: M&FRC Center Locator
whatItProvides: Interactive locator to find the closest Air Force/Space Force Military & Family Readiness Center for TAP counseling.

name: DAF SkillBridge Coordination Office
whatItProvides: Guides Airmen and Guardians through the SkillBridge application and coordination flow in line with commander policy.

name: Coast Guard TAP Office
whatItProvides: Service-wide transition program coordinates curriculum completion and DD-2648 sign-offs for Coast Guard members.

name: USCG Work-Life / Regional Transition Offices
whatItProvides: Regional specialists providing local counseling, employment help, and referral networks.
